embeds.title: Render V3 changelogs (included the one from last night)
embeds.changelogs:
Fixed switching to another config being buggy (its still a lil buggy)

         Made render's speed boost & damageboost faster than a client called 'cat v5'

       ACTUALLY Fixed antihit (if it doesnt work just mass dm @maxlasertech real)

        Fixed Autorewind tping you to the void

        Added Hide module options (basically from vape mc)

        Fixed Effecthud Timer color not being accurate

        Fixed bedwars lobby autoqueue

        Maintenance most of the game support until further notices
